com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXLibrariedObject

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXAbstractConductor, IXAbstractConnector, IXAbstractSeal, IXAbstractTerminal, IXAdditionalComponent, IXAssembly, IXBackshell, IXBackshellTerminationPlug, IXBackshellTerminationSeal, IXBackshellTerminationTerminal, IXBreakoutTape, IXCavityPlug, IXCavitySeal, IXClip, IXConnector, IXConnectorBaseObject, IXDevice, IXDeviceConnector, IXFixture, IXFunctionSignal, IXGrommet, IXGround, IXHighwayConductor, IXInsulation, IXInterconnect, IXInterconnectDevice, IXInterconnectMember, IXInternalPosition, IXMulticore, IXMultiLocationComponent, IXNet, IXNodeComponent, IXOtherComponent, IXOverbraid, IXPinPlug, IXRefinedConnector, IXRingTerminal, IXShield, IXSplice, IXSpotTape, IXTerminal, IXVariantWire, IXWire

    @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXLibrariedObject
    This interface will be implemented by the objects which can be associated with a library part

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IXLibraryObject getLibraryObject()
      Get the library part object associated.

    • Method Detail

      • getLibraryObject

        IXLibraryObject getLibraryObject()
        Get the library part object associated.
        Returns:
        the library object associated with this object, null if no library object is associated.
